413.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: preview(2) assumes current token is at index 0, but after parsing Decl or FuncDef, the index advances. Also, this condition fails to account for cases where a function name (IDENFR) is followed by '(' — it should check if current token is IDENFR and next is LPARENT, not preview(2). This can cause misclassification between Decl and FuncDef, leading to infinite loops or missed main function.]

Also, this condition fails to account for cases where a function name (IDENFR) is followed by '(' — it should check if current token is IDENFR and next is LPARENT, not preview(2).
